do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: strong identity field 'service_variant' differs (local vs sbs). Per route rule, different service variants never merge.

suggestion.rationale: The two records share base route BX6 but have explicit service_variant values 'local' and 'sbs', which are distinct. Per the Identity Merge Canon, different service variants never merge. The relation_context shows a 'connects_to' relation between them, confirming they are related but distinct objects. All internal aliases within each record are lifecycle/source variants and belong to their respective canonical records.
